prompt: I have a static HTML form I want to test: file:///C:/temp/form.html. Discover all the input fields and buttons on this page so I can write automation for it later. List what you find.
assertions: The decision tree for local HTML file (file://) is followed — attempts to read the HTML file directly first
Uses a file:// URL in the Playwright script (not http://)
The script uses page.locator() or similar to discover inputs and buttons
Does NOT use with_server.py (not needed for static HTML)
Output includes a list or print statement identifying the discovered elements
